entries.source: Reading knowledge plus formal speech routines
entries.value: Eolas léitheoireachta agus gnáthaimh fhoirmiúla chainte
Tá créachtaí polaitiúla le déanaí fós beo

entries.source: Recognition is useful, but it is weaker evidence than applying the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Tá aithint úsáideach, ach is fianaise níos laige í ná an smaoineamh a chur i bhfeidhm gan an freagra os do chomhair.

entries.source: Recommend opening questions for this encounter, grouped by interview, debate, contradiction, and legacy.
entries.value: Mol ceisteanna tosaigh don teagmháil seo, grúpáilte de réir agallaimh, díospóireachta, contrárthachta, agus oidhreachta.

entries.source: Reconstruct a decision, alternatives, constraints, and outcomes.
entries.value: Atóg cinneadh, roghanna malartacha, srianta, agus torthaí.
Bealaí isteach chuig an Red Fort

entries.source: Red sandstone heat, ink, perfumed paper, controlled silence, and many languages orbiting power.
entries.value: Teas gaineamhchloiche deirge, dúch, páipéar cumhraithe, tost faoi smacht, agus iliomad teangacha ag fithisiú na cumhachta.

entries.source: Reframe my next question as a student trying to understand the mental model, not just the biography.
entries.value: Athfhrámaigh mo chéad cheist eile mar dhalta atá ag iarraidh an tsamhail mheabhrach a thuiscint, ní an bheathaisnéis amháin.
Tá díospóireacht reiligiúnach luchtaithe go polaitiúil

entries.source: Remove weak, generic, or low-fit ideas quickly.
entries.value: Bain smaointe laga, ginearálta, nó mí-oiriúnacha go tapa.

entries.source: Removes the failing path instead of understanding it.
entries.value: Baineann sé an cosán teipthe seachas é a thuiscint.
Athainmnigh an athróg i ngach áit.

entries.source: Repairing the misconception makes the next problem easier instead of just more familiar.
entries.value: Má dheisítear an mhíthuiscint, bíonn an chéad fhadhb eile níos éasca, ní hamháin níos aithnidiúla.

entries.source: Repeating a definition without applying it can feel fluent while hiding gaps.
entries.value: Is féidir le sainmhíniú a athrá gan é a chur i bhfeidhm mothú líofa, agus bearnaí a cheilt.

entries.source: Rephrase the active question in simpler language. Ask only one question.
entries.value: Athfhocail an cheist ghníomhach i dteanga níos simplí. Cuir ceist amháin amháin.

entries.source: Reset the controls, move only one slider, and describe the before-and-after in plain language.
entries.value: Athshocraigh na rialuithe, bog sleamhnán amháin amháin, agus déan cur síos ar an roimh agus ina dhiaidh i ngnáthchaint.

entries.source: Resolve the event clock before opening the world
entries.value: Réitigh clog an imeachta sula n-osclaítear an domhan

entries.source: Restaurants and drivers can be suppliers, but this specific clue is about customers comparing and switching.
entries.value: Is féidir le bialanna agus tiománaithe a bheith ina soláthraithe, ach baineann an leid shonrach seo le custaiméirí ag comparáid agus ag aistriú.

entries.source: Restoration London faces plague memory, dense timber housing, and a fire that will reshape the city.
entries.value: Tá Londain an Athchóirithe ag tabhairt aghaidh ar chuimhne na plá, tithíocht adhmaid dhlúth, agus tine a athchruthóidh an chathair.

entries.source: Reveal the starting model before the lesson explains it.
entries.value: Nocht an tsamhail tosaigh sula míníonn an ceacht í.

entries.source: Rewrite the current rough section as a suggested edit. Show what changed and why before asking me to merge it.
entries.value: Athscríobh an chuid gharbh reatha mar eagarthóireacht mholta. Taispeáin cad a d'athraigh agus cén fáth sula n-iarrfaidh tú orm í a chumasc.

entries.source: Right. Transfer to a fresh example is stronger evidence than recognition.
entries.value: Ceart. Is fianaise níos láidre í an t-aistriú chuig sampla úr ná aithint.

entries.source: Right. You identified a seller-side cost shock and predicted the pressure on price.
entries.value: Ceart. D'aithin tú turraing chostais ar thaobh an díoltóra agus thuar tú an brú ar phraghas.

entries.source: Roman trade used amphorae and contracts
entries.value: D'úsáid trádáil Rómhánach amphorae agus conarthaí
Leideanna atá feasach ar an rúibric.
Is féidir le ráfla iompú i gcoinne daoine ón taobh amuigh

entries.source: Rumors move faster than verified news
entries.value: Gluaiseann ráflaí níos tapúla ná nuacht fhíoraithe

entries.source: Rupees, silver coin, credit through trusted households
entries.value: Rúipí, bonn airgid, creidmheas trí theaghlaigh iontaofa

entries.source: Safe, explanatory, and easier to pause for context.
entries.value: Sábháilte, míniúcháin, agus níos éasca a chur ar sos le haghaidh comhthéacs.

entries.source: Safer, more explanatory, and allowed to ask modern comparisons.
entries.value: Níos sábháilte, níos míniúcháin, agus ceadaítear comparáidí nua-aimseartha a iarraidh.

entries.source: Salt air, olive oil, rope fiber, shouted accounts, and the heavy logistics behind imperial abundance.
entries.value: Aer sáile, ola olóige, snáithín rópa, cuntais á nglaoch amach, agus an lóistíocht throm taobh thiar de fhlúirse impiriúil.

entries.source: Salt March strategist, St. Helena retrospective, 1946 committee room...
entries.value: Straitéiseach Mhórshiúl an tSalainn, siarbhreathnú St. Helena, seomra coiste 1946...

entries.source: Say why the mistake is tempting, then name the missing link.
entries.value: Abair cén fáth a bhfuil an botún mealltach, ansin ainmnigh an nasc atá ar iarraidh.

entries.source: Saying revenue is up, so the company is worth more ignores margins, reinvestment, working capital, and risk.
entries.value: Má deirtear go bhfuil ioncam suas agus gur fiú níos mó an chuideachta dá bhrí sin, déantar neamhaird de chorrlaigh, athinfheistíocht, caipiteal oibre, agus riosca.
Eolaíocht, ceannaireacht, daonlathas, an saol laethúil...

entries.source: Seeing the output change but not naming the mechanism.
entries.value: An t-aschur a fheiceáil ag athrú ach gan an mheicníocht a ainmniú.

entries.source: Set a place, period, and mission. Your guide will keep the trip bounded to the era and mark speculation clearly.
entries.value: Socraigh áit, tréimhse, agus misean. Coinneoidh do threoraí an turas teoranta don ré agus marcálfaidh sé tuairimíocht go soiléir.

entries.source: Set a thinking target and I will ask the first diagnostic question.
entries.value: Socraigh sprioc smaointeoireachta agus cuirfidh mé an chéad cheist dhiagnóiseach.

entries.source: Several locations, figures, artifacts, and field notes.
entries.value: Roinnt suíomhanna, pearsana, déantán, agus nótaí allamuigh.

entries.source: Short factual notes clarify uncertainty, bias, and interpretation.
entries.value: Soiléiríonn nótaí gearra fíorasacha éiginnteacht, claonadh, agus léirmhíniú.

entries.source: Short summaries keep both sides aligned before moving on.
entries.value: Coinníonn achoimrí gearra an dá thaobh ar aon dul sula mbogtar ar aghaidh.

entries.source: Should a company enter this market?
entries.value: Ar cheart do chuideachta dul isteach sa mhargadh seo?
Ar cheart dom glacadh leis an bpost seo?

entries.source: Show more uncertainty, anachronism, and source-boundary notes.
entries.value: Taispeáin níos mó éiginnteachta, ainchróineachais, agus nótaí faoi theorainneacha foinsí.

entries.source: Show the person's major beliefs at this time, their blind spots, and what they would likely resist understanding.
entries.value: Taispeáin príomhchreidimh an duine ag an am seo, a gcuid dallspotaí, agus an rud is dócha a chuirfidís ina aghaidh a thuiscint.
Tá brú an léigir ag ardú

entries.source: Sketch the outline, sections, or table before polishing language.
entries.value: Sceitseáil an t-imlíne, na rannáin, nó an tábla sula snasófar an teanga.

entries.source: Small nudges arrive before direct explanations.
entries.value: Tagann spreagthaí beaga roimh mhínithe díreacha.

entries.source: Small reserve in local coin or credit
entries.value: Cúlchiste beag i mbonn áitiúil nó i gcreidmheas

entries.source: Socrates was tried and executed in 399 BCE
entries.value: Cuireadh Sócraitéas ar a thriail agus chun báis sa bhliain 399 RC

entries.source: someone who changed education and faced serious opposition
entries.value: duine a d'athraigh an t-oideachas agus a thug aghaidh ar fhreasúra tromchúiseach

entries.source: Sources, confidence, uncertainty, and forbidden quotes.
entries.value: Foinsí, muinín, éiginnteacht, agus sleachta toirmiscthe.
Taiscéalaíocht spáis, stair na hIndia, ailgéabar...

entries.source: Specific prices vary by evidence and period
entries.value: Athraíonn praghsanna sonracha de réir fianaise agus tréimhse

entries.source: Specific private opinions of unnamed residents
entries.value: Tuairimí príobháideacha sonracha cónaitheoirí gan ainm

entries.source: Split work into AI-owned, user-owned, and shared moves.
entries.value: Roinn an obair ina bearta faoi úinéireacht AI, faoi úinéireacht an úsáideora, agus ina mbearta roinnte.

entries.source: Stage the person, year, room, and relationship.
entries.value: Socraigh an duine, an bhliain, an seomra, agus an caidreamh.

entries.source: Standing idle with strange questions during a disaster invites suspicion.
entries.value: Má sheastar díomhaoin le ceisteanna aisteacha le linn tubaiste, tarraingítear amhras.

entries.source: Start a Time Travel expedition. Do not open a generic chat and do not write a broad period summary.
entries.value: Tosaigh turas Taisteal Ama. Ná hoscail comhrá cineálach agus ná scríobh achoimre leathan tréimhse.

entries.source: Start with a concept, case, argument, decision, or text.
entries.value: Tosaigh le coincheap, cás, argóint, cinneadh, nó téacs.

entries.source: Start with a question, not a lecture.
entries.value: Tosaigh le ceist, ní le léacht.

entries.source: Start with a tiny lesson, one check question, a mastery meter, and wait for my answer before continuing.
entries.value: Tosaigh le ceacht beag, ceist seiceála amháin, méadar máistreachta, agus fan le mo fhreagra sula leanfaidh tú ar aghaidh.

entries.source: Start with an era passport, a vivid arrival scene, three choices for what to do next, and a compact timeline log.
entries.value: Tosaigh le pas ré, radharc teachta beoga, trí rogha don chéad chéim eile, agus loga amlíne dlúth.

entries.source: Start with one specific question or task.
entries.value: Tosaigh le ceist nó tasc sonrach amháin.

entries.source: State the idea in one sentence so it can be tested.
entries.value: Luaigh an smaoineamh in aon abairt amháin ionas gur féidir é a thástáil.

entries.source: State your starting idea so the tutor has something to test.
entries.value: Luaigh do smaoineamh tosaigh ionas go mbeidh rud éigin ag an teagascóir le tástáil.

entries.source: Stateful exploration with consequences and evolving risk.
entries.value: Taiscéalaíocht staidiúil le hiarmhairtí agus riosca ag forbairt.

entries.source: Step by step, brainstorm first, solve together...
entries.value: Céim ar chéim, déan ransú smaointe ar dtús, réitigh le chéile...

entries.source: Step out of character briefly. Explain the historical context, evidence quality, and uncertainties behind the last exchange.
entries.value: Éirigh as an gcarachtar go hachomair. Mínigh an comhthéacs stairiúil, cáilíocht na fianaise, agus na héiginnteachtaí taobh thiar den mhalartú deireanach.

entries.source: Stone dust, wool dye, bells, and sharp political glances under a crowded square.
entries.value: Deannach cloiche, ruaim olla, cloig, agus spléachanna géara polaitiúla faoi chearnóg phlódaithe.

entries.source: Stop editing directly for this turn. Give concise advice and one practical next move.
entries.value: Stop den eagarthóireacht dhíreach don bhabhta seo. Tabhair comhairle gonta agus céim phraiticiúil amháin eile.

entries.source: Stopped. Send another message whenever you are ready.
entries.value: Stoptha. Seol teachtaireacht eile nuair atá tú réidh.

entries.source: Strict mode keeps modern knowledge out of the world and applies social consequences sooner.
entries.value: Coinníonn mód docht eolas nua-aimseartha amach as an domhan agus cuireann sé iarmhairtí sóisialta i bhfeidhm níos luaithe.

entries.source: Strong writing is a chain of claim, reason, evidence, and consequence. Each sentence should do a job in that chain.
entries.value: Is slabhra d'éileamh, cúis, fianaise, agus iarmhairt í scríbhneoireacht láidir. Ba cheart go ndéanfadh gach abairt jab sa slabhra sin.

entries.source: Substitutes are alternatives like cooking or pickup. Comparing apps is buyer leverage inside the category.
entries.value: Is roghanna malartacha iad ionadaithe cosúil le cócaireacht nó bailiú. Is giaráil cheannaitheora laistigh den chatagóir í aipeanna a chur i gcomparáid.

entries.source: Suggest candidates with strong evidence and vivid settings.
entries.value: Mol iarrthóirí le fianaise láidir agus suíomhanna beoga.
Tá soláthairtí agus dílseachtaí faoi bhrú

entries.source: Supply shifts left and price tends to rise.
entries.value: Bogann soláthar ar chlé agus bíonn claonadh ag praghas ardú.

entries.source: Take the first pass on the shared artifact. Make the structure visible, mark assumptions, and ask me to accept, edit, or reject.
entries.value: Déan an chéad iarracht ar an déantán roinnte. Déan an struchtúr infheicthe, marcáil toimhdí, agus iarr orm glacadh leis, é a chur in eagar, nó é a dhiúltú.

entries.source: Tang Chang'an is a cosmopolitan imperial capital linked to steppe, Central Asian, and Buddhist networks.
entries.value: Is príomhchathair impiriúil ilchultúrtha í Chang'an na Tang, ceangailte le líonraí steipe, Lár-Áiseacha, agus Búdacha.

entries.source: Target: one sentence describing the learning target.
entries.value: Sprioc: abairt amháin a dhéanann cur síos ar an sprioc foghlama.

entries.source: That catches the revenue movement, but misses the margin and cash timing links. Sales alone do not prove cash flow improved.
entries.value: Gabhann sé sin gluaiseacht an ioncaim, ach cailleann sé naisc an chorrlaigh agus uainiú an airgid. Ní chruthaíonn díolacháin leo féin gur tháinig feabhas ar shreabhadh airgid.

entries.source: That may hide the symptom, but it does not teach you where the data flow broke.
entries.value: D'fhéadfadh sé sin an tsiomptóm a cheilt, ach ní mhúineann sé duit cá bhris an sreabhadh sonraí.

entries.source: The assistant must identify known facts before simulating
entries.value: Caithfidh an cúntóir fíricí aitheanta a aithint sula ndéanann sé ionsamhlú

entries.source: The Athenian agora was a civic center
entries.value: Ba lárionad cathartha í agora na hAithne

entries.source: The explanation that links evidence back to the claim.
entries.value: An míniú a nascann an fhianaise ar ais leis an éileamh.

entries.source: The final summary waits until you have done real thinking.
entries.value: Fanann an achoimre dheiridh go dtí go mbíonn fíorsmaoineamh déanta agat.

entries.source: The first scene should become concrete only after the destination is resolved.
entries.value: Níor cheart don chéad radharc éirí nithiúil ach tar éis an ceann scríbe a réiteach.
Thosaigh an Dóiteán Mór sa bhliain 1666

entries.source: The Indian Rebellion of 1857 has made Delhi a contested imperial and military space.
entries.value: Rinne Éirí Amach na hIndia 1857 spás impiriúil agus míleata conspóideach de Delhi.

entries.source: The learner can connect a variable change to an outcome.
entries.value: Is féidir leis an bhfoghlaimeoir athrú athróige a nascadh le toradh.

entries.source: The learner can explain the key link in their own words.
entries.value: Is féidir leis an bhfoghlaimeoir an nasc lárnach a mhíniú ina bhfocail féin.

entries.source: The learner can identify and fix the misconception.
entries.value: Is féidir leis an bhfoghlaimeoir an mhíthuiscint a aithint agus a cheartú.

entries.source: The learner can make a first prediction.
entries.value: Is féidir leis an bhfoghlaimeoir céad thuar a dhéanamh.

entries.source: The learner explains it back in their own words.
entries.value: Míníonn an foghlaimeoir ar ais é ina bhfocail féin.

entries.source: The longest sentence, because shorter is always stronger.
entries.value: An abairt is faide, mar bíonn an rud is giorra níos láidre i gcónaí.

entries.source: The person should not know future events unless you explicitly open modern confrontation.
entries.value: Níor cheart go mbeadh imeachtaí amach anseo ar eolas ag an duine mura n-osclaíonn tú achrann nua-aimseartha go sainráite.

entries.source: The Roman Empire under Trajan's final year depends on ports, credit, labor, and imperial logistics.
entries.value: Braitheann Impireacht na Róimhe sa bhliain dheireanach de réimeas Trajan ar chalafoirt, creidmheas, saothar, agus lóistíocht impiriúil.

entries.source: The scene is being established by the dossier.
entries.value: Tá an radharc á bhunú ag an sainchomhad.

entries.source: The simulation will prioritize different people, risks, objects, and explanations.
entries.value: Tabharfaidh an t-ionsamhlú tús áite do dhaoine, rioscaí, réada, agus mínithe éagsúla.

entries.source: The title, because every weak paragraph has a weak title.
entries.value: An teideal, mar bíonn teideal lag ag gach alt lag.

entries.source: The Travel Designer should resolve this intent into a specific historical place, date, and political moment before arrival.
entries.value: Ba cheart don Travel Designer an rún seo a réiteach ina áit stairiúil, dáta, agus nóiméad polaitiúil sonrach roimh theacht.

entries.source: The version of a person matters more than the name.
entries.value: Is tábhachtaí leagan an duine ná an t-ainm.

entries.source: The West Market hosted long-distance trade
entries.value: D'óstáil an Margadh Thiar trádáil fad-achair

entries.source: This is the evidence checkpoint. You advance only by showing the skill.
entries.value: Is é seo seicphointe na fianaise. Ní théann tú chun cinn ach tríd an scil a léiriú.

entries.source: This lets you explain why a model moves instead of just copying formulas.
entries.value: Ligeann sé seo duit a mhíniú cén fáth a mbogann samhail seachas foirmlí a chóipeáil amháin.

entries.source: Time slice: not chosen yet. If a specific person is named, offer 4 to 5 historically meaningful versions of this person before any in-character dialogue. Explain how each version changes the worldview, stakes, and setting.
entries.value: Slis ama: níl sé roghnaithe fós. Má ainmnítear duine sonrach, tairg 4 go 5 leagan den duine seo a bhfuil brí stairiúil leo roimh aon dialóg i gcarachtar. Mínigh conas a athraíonn gach leagan an dearcadh domhanda, na geallta, agus an suíomh.

entries.source: Titles matter, but this clue points to reasoning inside the paragraph.
entries.value: Tá tábhacht le teidil, ach díríonn an leid seo ar réasúnaíocht laistigh den alt.

entries.source: Trace a trade route on the map
entries.value: Rianaigh bealach trádála ar an léarscáil

entries.source: trace cause and effect in code
entries.value: rianaigh cúis agus éifeacht i gcód

entries.source: Track accepted changes, rejected changes, and the next edit.
entries.value: Rianaigh athruithe glactha, athruithe diúltaithe, agus an chéad eagarthóireacht eile.

entries.source: Track decisions and open questions. Preserve my voice in writing tasks. Ask at most one practical question if context is missing.
entries.value: Rianaigh cinntí agus ceisteanna oscailte. Caomhnaigh mo ghuth i dtascanna scríbhneoireachta. Cuir ceist phraiticiúil amháin ar a mhéad má tá comhthéacs ar iarraidh.
Frásaí trádála agus stór focal tí
